steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Square first, then multiply.
$$f(7)=5\cdot 49=245$$
That is the correct answer.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches 245. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
